# Price Match Eligibility

Acme Shop offers price matching for identical in-stock items from a select group of approved major retailers. To qualify, the competing item's lower price must be directly offered by the retailer without involving third-party sellers, and it must be available to the general public rather than being restricted to members or clearance deals.

[Source: price_matching.md#price-match-eligibility]
